# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

---
network:
  host: 0.0.0.0
  publish_host: _eth0:ipv4_
  bind_host: 0.0.0.0
  publish_port: 9200
  protocol: https

http:
  enabled: true
  cors:
    - '*'

discovery:
  zen:
    ping:
      multicast:
        enabled: false
     unicast:
        hosts:
          - "node1.example.com"
          - "node2.example.com"
    minimum_master_nodes: 2

---

This configuration file sets up an Elasticsearch cluster with the following settings:

* Networking: Binds to all interfaces for accessibility and publishes on IP address _eth0:ipv4_. Enables HTTPS protocol.
* CORS: Allows cross-origin requests from any origin.
* Cluster discovery and node communication: Sets up Zen discovery with ping-based unicast hosts for node1.example.com and node2.example.com, and requires at least 2 master nodes to be available in the cluster.

Note that this is just an example configuration and you should review and customize it according to your specific needs and infrastructure.
